MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF RESPONSE AND OBJECTIONS TO PETITION FOR REFORMATION OF TRUST TO CORRECT SCRIVENER'S ERROR, CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2011 NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: LINDA HANNAWALT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF RESPONSE AND OBJECTIONS TO PETITION FOR REFORMATION OF TRUST TO CORRECT SCRIVENER'S ERRORS IS GRANTED IN PART. THE SENTENCE BEGINNING "WHEN BENEFICIARIES RAISED . . AT" PAGE 2 LINE 4 THROUGH LINE 11 IS STRICKEN. REMAINDER OF THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. THE COURT WILL ISSUE THE ORDER.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Quash Subpoena To Wells Fargo Advisors Or In The Alternative For A Protective Order Preventing Disclosure; Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Denied

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bette Epstein for Linda Hannawalt (as Trustee of the 2006 Trust). Carolyn Johnston and Jennifer Lee for the Willis Hannawalt Children. Jim Hannawalt is also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Demurrer and the Motion for Order to Quash Subpoena, etc. The Tentative is confirmed as to the Demurrer except it is 30 days leave to amend instead of 10 days leave (The demurrer is sustained with 30 days leave to amend either (a) to exclude claims based on Willis Hannawalt's alleged wrongdoing because such claims are subject to the statutory creditor claim procedures or (b) to allege compliance with such creditor's claim requirements). Mrs. Epstein is to prepare the order. The Motion to Quash Subpoena is denied. The Subpoena as to the Trust and Willis is limited to 2004 and forward. The Subpoena for Linda is limited to 2010 and forward. The discs previously produced by Wells Fargo Bank shall be returned by the paties to Wells Fargo Bank. Both sides's request for sanctions are denied. (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
